focus: code-vs-reference correctness against microsoft/unilm Diff-Transformer/multihead_diffattn.py and arXiv:2410.05258
verdict: Faithful to the canonical Diff-Transformer math and implementation; no concrete correctness bugs found; no in-place fixes required. Verified: head_dim=n_embd//n_head//2 with 2*n_head q/k sub-heads and n_head v heads of 2*head_dim (q/k/v widths stay n_embd, parameter/FLOP matched); lambda=exp(q1.k1)-exp(q2.k2)+lambda_init with four head_dim vectors init N(0,0.1); reshape (B,2*n_head,T,T)->(B,n_head,2,T,T) then att[:,:,0]-lambda_full*att[:,:,1]; per-head RMSNorm(2*head_dim) then *(1-lambda_init); documented harness compromises (fixed lambda_init=0.8 for missing layer index; manual masked-softmax path because fused SDPA hides the two maps) accurate and justified.
